problem.title: X-ICP on KITTI Raw drive 0061 full sequence (703 frames, residential)
problem.question: How does X-ICP perform on the KITTI Raw drive 0061 full sequence (703 frames, residential)?

variants.label: Default (GT seed)
variants.intent: Repository default with ground-truth seed initialization.
variants.note: Uses GT-seeded scan-to-map initialization with weak-update fallback in this dogfooding tool.
variants.readability_note: Uses the default CLI surface only.
variants.extensibility_note: No extra profile knobs beyond the stable core contract.
variants.decision_reason: Close enough to the current default to keep as a live alternative.

variants.label: Fast (GT seed)
variants.intent: Coarser voxel map and smaller working set while keeping the GT-seeded initialization path.
variants.note: Uses GT-seeded scan-to-map initialization with weak-update fallback in this dogfooding tool.
variants.readability_note: Adds only boolean toggles on top of the stable CLI.
variants.extensibility_note: Still stays inside the stable CLI, but expands the toggle surface.
variants.decision_reason: Best combined benchmark score on the shared dataset and interface.

variants.label: Dense (GT seed)
variants.intent: Finer voxel map and larger correspondence budget while keeping the GT-seeded initialization path.
variants.note: Uses GT-seeded scan-to-map initialization with weak-update fallback in this dogfooding tool.
variants.readability_note: Adds only boolean toggles on top of the stable CLI.
variants.extensibility_note: Still stays inside the stable CLI, but expands the toggle surface.
variants.decision_reason: Close enough to the current default to keep as a live alternative.

variants.label: No GT seed
variants.intent: Ablation without ground-truth seed to test convergence from identity.
variants.note: Uses odometry-chain scan-to-map initialization (no GT seed).
variants.readability_note: Adds only boolean toggles on top of the stable CLI.
variants.extensibility_note: Still stays inside the stable CLI, but expands the toggle surface.
variants.decision_reason: Useful for comparison, but not strong enough to replace the current default.
